data.title: DOGE Up 3%, SHIB Up 7%: How High Can Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Go?
data.description: Despite price consolidation, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) have maintained strong bullish momentum, buoyed by broader market recovery and community enthusiasm.

data.title: Box Posts Earnings Beat, But Analyst Maintains Bearish View About Uncertain Enterprise Advanced Adoption
data.description: RBC Capital Markets analyst reiterated Underperform rating and price target of $21 for Box Inc after Q3 results. Revenue and EPS beat estimates.

data.title: Jerome Powell Says US Economy In 'Remarkably Good Shape,' Fed Can Be 'A Little More Cautious' With Interest Rates
data.description: U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell painted a rosy picture around the U.S. economy ahead of key jobs data due Friday. The strength of the economy is allowing the Fed to be more cautious with interest rates.
